name: Button
description: A widget that enables users to trigger an action or event, such as submitting a form, opening a dialog, canceling an action, or performing a delete operation.

roles.description: Identifies the element as a button (not needed on native <button>)

required_attributes.description: Computed from text content, aria-labelledby, or aria-label

optional_attributes.description: true when toggled on; false when toggled off
Indicates whether the controlled grouping is expanded or collapsed
Indicates the button opens a menu popup
true to indicate the button is present but not interactive

notes: Always prefer native <button> or <input type='button'> over role='button'
If using a non-button element, add tabindex='0' and handle Enter+Space key events
Do not use <div> or <span> as buttons without proper ARIA and keyboard support
